Daily reversal levels for April 15, 2026.

Quick start instructions 

Download the quick start guide for reversal levels: ReversalLevels.pdf.
If you are a new subscriber then check out the strategy ebooks in the shared Google Drive folder.

Working with the data tables:

  • Click on the grey buttons to go to the tab of your choice.
  • Clicking on the table headers will sort them in various ways. Clicking a header a second time will reverse the sorting order.
  • You can enter your favourite tickers, separated by commas, in the textareas below.
    They will appear in the "My1" until "My5" tab. Your tickers will be kept in local storage of the browser you use.
  • To find individual stocks start typing in the "Search" box above the table (works best in the "All" tab). The first letters of a name or ticker are usually enough to bring it up.
    Typing "buy" (or "sell") will show you all stocks giving buy (sell) signals.
  • Hovering or tapping on an item in the Action column displays the brief strategy description.
  • Hovering or tapping on a reversal level ("RevL") shows the "QuickTarget" and "Opportunist price". (see: Strategy PDF files)
  • Hovering or tapping on the "Days" column brings up the starting date and price of the current position (based on daily Mode).
  • Hovering or tapping on the weekly trend ("Tr") in the fourth column displays the weekly reversal level.
  • Hovering or tapping on a stock name in the first column will open the Rela chart (if available).
  • Hovering or tapping on a stock ticker in the second column will open the latest Iceberg chart (if available).
  • Clicking on the blue square to the left of a stock's name will open more info and news in a separate window/tab.
Note: you can click the "Hide Me" button above this text to toggle the visbility of this section.

Settings 

  • Number of tickers per display page: (set this to fit your device)
  • Set your QuickTarget multiplier: (values between 0.1 - 0.9)
  • Set your Opportunist multiplier: (values between 0.1 - 0.9)

You can keep up to 5 different watch lists. They will appear in their own tabs.
Enter your tickers separated by commas:

My1 list:

My2 list:

My3 list:
